title: coryphantha radians
intro: Coryphantha radians, also known as the radial beavertail cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Coryphantha. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The radial beavertail cactus has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Coryphantha radians can be made by infusing the plant's stems and flowers in water to create a tea or by drying the plant to make a powder for use in supplements or topical applications.
